loanguard.title: LoanGuard
loanguard.desc: Analyze loan agreements from Indian banks, NBFCs, and credit card providers for compliance and hidden charges.

finsight.title: FinSight
finsight.desc: Upload your UPI, Amazon & Flipkart statements to uncover spending blind spots and get a personalized investment plan.

coming_soon.title: Coming Soon
coming_soon.desc: More financial protection tools are on the way.

step1.title: Welcome to LoanGuard!
step1.content: Let's take a quick tour to show you how to protect your finances.

step2.title: LoanGuard
step2.content: This is our main tool. Upload your loan documents here, and we'll scan them for hidden fees and check if they follow RBI rules.

step3.title: SIP Calculator
step3.content: Use this tool to plan your investments and see how your money can grow over time.

step4.title: Language switch
step4.content: You can change the language here to Hindi or English at any time.

step1.title: Welcome to LoanGuard
step1.content: This powerful tool analyzes loan documents to protect you from hidden traps. Let's see how it works!

step2.title: Upload Document
step2.content: You can upload a PDF of your loan agreement here, or paste the text directly into the text box.

step3.title: Analysis Stages
step3.content: Our AI will run through several stages, checking for RBI compliance, hidden fees, and behavioral risks.

step4.title: Safety Scoreboard
step4.content: This gauge tells you how risky your loan is from 0 (safe) to 100 (very dangerous). Lower is better!

step5.title: Your Loan Details
step5.content: Here you can see the key numbers — your loan amount, interest rate, and exactly what you'll be paying every month. Hover over any tile to read a plain explanation.

step6.title: Important Safety Rules
step6.content: These tiles show if the bank followed the basic legal rules — like providing a Key Facts page for your loan. Red tiles mean something is wrong!

step7.title: Red Flags Detected
step7.content: These colored badges show specific problems we found — from suspicious auto-debit clauses to penalties that may be illegal.

step_lang.title: Switch Language
step_lang.content: You can switch this entire analysis to Hindi, Telugu, Tamil, or Malayalam at any time using this button — including all results and explanations.

summary.total_real_payment: What you ACTUALLY will pay back
summary.total_stated_payment: What they claim you are paying
summary.overcharge_desc: Estimated hidden extra money charged to you
summary.kfs_missing_desc: Critical required summary page is surprisingly missing.
summary.penal_high: Penalty rate is extremely high and might be unfair.
summary.penal_check: Ensure this penalty is fixed, and not endlessly compounding.
summary.bounce_high: This fee is really high for a single missed instance.
summary.prepay_illegal: Charging you for closing a floating-rate loan early is illegal.
summary.prepay_warn: You will be penalized if you try to finish this loan faster.
summary.no_prepay: No penalties for paying off early
summary.insurance_warn: They added insurance into your loan. Did you agree to this?
summary.moratorium_warn: Make sure interest during this break isn't secretly added to your debt.
summary.apr_mismatch_desc: True cost (APR) derived from your EMI is surprisingly high compared to stated rate.
summary.emi_flag_desc: They are charging you more than expected per month.

flags.early_interest: Charging you before getting the money

risk.title: Safety Scoreboard
risk.label: RISK
risk.payment_diff_desc: Difference between stated and our calculated monthly payment
risk.hidden_fees_desc: Processing fee above permitted cap or undisclosed charges
risk.rule_breaks_desc: Safety rules broken in the agreement
risk.unfair_penalties_desc: Compounded penal charges on overdue payments
risk.missing_info_desc: Missing KFS or important safety clauses
risk.hidden_meaning_desc: Vague conditions that put you at risk

finsip.title: FinSip Calculator
finsip.desc: Simulate and predict your Mutual Fund returns powered by AI and historical market data.
finsip.try_different: Try a different search or category
finsip.disclaimer: Data from AMFI via mfapi.in · NAV updated daily · Not investment advice
finsip.fan_chart_desc: Thousands of simulated paths based on historical data

step1.title: Welcome to FinSip!
step1.content: A smart tool to safely plan and predict your mutual fund investments.

step2.title: Top SIP Performers
step2.content: Browse India's top performing funds. Use the categories above to filter by fund type.

step3.title: LoanGuard Predictor
step3.content: Click 'Simulate' on any fund to run our AI LoanGuard Predictor. It runs thousands of scenarios behind the scenes to show your realistic best and worst case returns.

step2_types.title: Types of Mutual Funds
step2_types.content: Equity funds (Large/Mid/Small cap) invest in stocks for higher returns. Debt funds act like safe bank deposits. Index funds track the overall market passively, and ELSS helps you save on your annual taxes!

step1.title: Welcome to FinSight
step1.content: Upload your bank statement to analyze your spending patterns and get personalized allocation advice.

step2.title: Upload Your Statement
step2.content: Drag and drop your bank statement PDF or click to browse. We analyze your transactions securely.

step3.title: Confirm Your Income
step3.content: Use the slider to adjust your monthly income. This helps us calculate your ideal spending allocation.

step4.content: Tell us about your existing savings in FDs, mutual funds, and other investments.

finsight.upload_desc: Upload your bank statement PDF and optionally your Amazon or Flipkart order pages. Up to 5 files.
finsight.drag_drop: Drag & drop files here, or click to browse
finsight.file_formats: PDF, JPG, PNG, WEBP · Max 15MB per file
finsight.income_reason: We need this to calculate how much you can invest
finsight.lumpsum_opportunities: One-Time Purchases → What They Could Have Become
finsight.savings_optional: Optional — helps us personalize your emergency fund and investment allocation
finsight.fd_hint: Total current value of all FDs and RDs
finsight.mf_hint: Current market value of all MF investments
finsight.other_hint: PPF, NPS, gold, savings account balance, etc.
finsight.factored_assessment: This will be factored into your emergency fund assessment
finsight.fd_help: If you already have an FD of ₹3L, your emergency fund is likely covered — we'll redirect that allocation straight into investments instead.
finsight.quiz_q1: If you had ₹10,000 extra, what would you do?
finsight.quiz_q1_a: Keep it safe in a bank account
finsight.quiz_q1_b: Split it — some safe, some for growth
finsight.quiz_q1_c: Put it all where it can grow the most
finsight.quiz_q2: When do you think you'll need this money?
finsight.quiz_q2_c: After 7+ years, I'm in no rush
finsight.quiz_q3: If your savings went down temporarily, how would you feel?
finsight.quiz_q3_a: Very uncomfortable — I'd want it back safe
finsight.quiz_q3_b: A bit worried but I'd wait and watch
finsight.quiz_q3_c: Fine — I know it'll bounce back

upload.browse_hint: or click to browse · PDF only · Max {{size}}MB
upload.tip_body: For best results, paste the complete agreement text including all interest rate clauses, fee schedules, penal charge terms, and foreclosure conditions. Truncated text reduces detection accuracy.
upload.textarea_placeholder:
Paste your loan agreement text here… (minimum 50 characters)

Tip: Copy the full agreement including all clauses, charges, and interest terms for the most accurate analysis.
upload.error_too_large: File is too large. Maximum size is {{size}}MB.

violations.title: Compliance Violations
violations.subtitle: All violations found in the document, sorted by severity
violations.no_violations: No violations detected — this loan appears compliant!
violations.no_money_loss: No direct money loss — but this is a
violations.math_proven_desc: Detected via deterministic formula — not AI-dependent, 100% certain
violations.ai_detected_desc: Detected via AI analysis of document text against RBI guidelines
violations.problems_desc: Each item below is a rule your bank may have broken. Tap any item to understand what it means for you.
violations.no_violations_desc: This agreement appears compliant with reviewed RBI guidelines

loan_summary.plain_principal_missing: Could not detect your loan amount
loan_summary.plain_interest: You pay {{rate}} of your balance as interest each year
loan_summary.plain_interest_missing: Bank did not clearly state the interest rate
loan_summary.plain_apr_mismatch: Real cost is higher than what the bank stated — hidden charges are inflating it
loan_summary.plain_apr_ok: Includes all fees — this is what you truly pay
loan_summary.plain_tenure: You will be paying EMIs for {{years}} year(s)
loan_summary.plain_expected_emi: What your EMI should be, calculated by us using the standard formula
loan_summary.plain_processing_fee: Deducted upfront — you received less than your loan amount
loan_summary.plain_overcharge_yes: Extra money charged beyond what is legally allowed — you can demand this back
loan_summary.plain_kfs_present: Bank gave you the required 1-page loan summary
loan_summary.plain_kfs_missing: Bank legally must give you this — it is missing
loan_summary.plain_penal_high: Over 3%/month — RBI says this is too high
loan_summary.plain_penal_ok: Check that this is not also compounding into your balance
loan_summary.plain_bounce_high: RBI cap is ₹500 — you're being charged ₹{{excess}} extra
loan_summary.plain_bounce_ok: Charged if your EMI payment fails — within legal limit
loan_summary.plain_prepay_illegal: Charging you for early closure on a floating-rate loan is illegal under RBI
loan_summary.plain_prepay_warn: You will be penalised if you try to pay off this loan early
loan_summary.plain_prepay_ok: No penalties for paying off early
loan_summary.plain_insurance_warn: Was this insurance added without clearly asking you? You may be able to reject it
loan_summary.plain_insurance_ok: No insurance bundled into this loan
loan_summary.plain_moratorium_warn: Interest during this break may be quietly added to your loan balance
loan_summary.safety_rules_desc: did your bank follow the rules?
loan_summary.total_bank_claims: What the bank claims you owe (total)
loan_summary.flag_bank_discretion: Bank can change your interest rate anytime
loan_summary.flag_apr_mismatch: True rate higher than stated — {{pct}}% deviation

escalation.header_desc: These are ready-to-send letters. Start at Level 1 and only move up if the bank doesn't respond.
escalation.rbi_rules_cited: RBI rules cited in this letter
escalation.footer_tip: Always attempt Level 1 (write to your bank) before filing with regulators. The RBI Ombudsman requires you to have tried the bank first — keep copies of all letters you send.
